name: Tori trUSD
collateral: Delta-neutral trading positions across global markets: hedged money markets, futures arbitrage, calendar spreads, and options strategies; all positions backed by USDC and USDT deposits with real-time verification via Accountable DVN
pegMechanism: 1:1 mint and redeem against USDC or USDT with 0.1% fee; peg maintained by arbitrage incentives and delta-neutral portfolio construction offsetting directional exposure
launchPhaseDetail: Dual audits completed (Sherlock Jan 2026, Nethermind Mar 2026); seed round led by Delphi Ventures announced Mar 25; contract addresses still TBA in docs; app not yet live; not tracked on DefiLlama or CoinGecko

featuredContent.title: Tori Finance launch announcement
featuredContent.description: Tori wraps institutional strategies into strUSD — a liquid, composable, yield-bearing token backed by delta-neutral positions verified in real time.

featuredContent.title: Tori Secures Backing from Delphi Ventures
featuredContent.description: Tori Finance raises seed funding from Delphi Ventures to bring institutional yield on-chain through trUSD.

milestones.title: Sherlock collaborative audit completed
milestones.description: Full protocol scope audit covering core protocol, trUSD token, strUSD staking, access control, and oracle integration.

milestones.title: Tori Finance announces trUSD launch on X
milestones.description: Launch announcement for trUSD and strUSD with mint/redeem via USDC and USDT; ~15% advertised APY from delta-neutral strategies; contracts not yet deployed as of early April.

milestones.title: Delphi Ventures leads seed round; QInvest, CMCC Global, Bering Waters also participate
Nethermind security review completed
milestones.description: Full protocol scope security review; all findings addressed.
